questions.question: What is a Large Language Model mainly designed to work with?
How does a Large Language Model learn during training?
options: By studying patterns in large amounts of text
By connecting to the internet in real time

questions.question: What does a Large Language Model mainly do when generating text?
options: Predicts the most likely next token

questions.question: What is one common limitation of Large Language Models?
options: They only work in one language
